creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
tabthorpe    2009-02-24 14:22:01 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    hebrew               Makefile 
  Added files:
    hebrew/geresh        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    hebrew/geresh/files  patch-cxx.patch 
  Log:
  Geresh is a multi lingual text editor, but there are a few features
  for the benefit of users of Hebrew and Arabic, such as: the ability
  to display the signs point the Hebrew / Arabic (dash Hebrew) as an
  alternative, convenient editing of characters in the format of the
  BiDi (such as RLM, LRM), an alternative algorithm Greek paragraphs
  to set the emulation of the Hebrew keyboard.
  
  PR:             ports/130087
  Submitted by:   Eitan Adler <EitanAdlerList at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.17      +1 -0      ports/hebrew/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/hebrew/geresh/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/hebrew/geresh/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +59 -0     ports/hebrew/geresh/files/patch-cxx.patch (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/hebrew/geresh/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +16 -0     ports/hebrew/geresh/pkg-plist (new)
